# Getting help

- **"How do I…" / "Why does my receipt show…"** — start with the
  [user guide](../docs/guide/01-getting-started.md) and
  [troubleshooting](../docs/guide/12-troubleshooting.md), then ask in
  [Discussions](https://github.com/anandgupta42/receipts/discussions).
- **Something is broken** — open a
  [bug report](https://github.com/anandgupta42/receipts/issues/new/choose).
  Include `aireceipts --json` output where you can — skim it first: it
  contains local file paths to your transcripts (`filePath`), so redact
  anything you don't want public. Never paste a raw transcript (it contains
  your prompts and code).
- **A price is wrong** — use the
  [vendor price issue form](https://github.com/anandgupta42/receipts/issues/new/choose);
  price corrections need a citable source (invariant I3).
- **Security or privacy** — don't use public issues; see
  [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the private reporting path.

One maintainer reads all of it. Response times are best-effort; bugs with a
reproduction get attention first.
